segments.text: A lot more space to deal with.
I think that's really important, especially with Cloud.
If you're center stage, if you're on the Pokeball,
it's going to be a while before you get hit so far off stage
where it's not going to be enough.

full_text: A lot more space to deal with. I think that's really important, especially with Cloud. If you're center stage, if you're on the Pokeball, it's going to be a while before you get hit so far off stage where it's not going to be enough. And the back air. Yeah.
